# kUSBInformationDeviceIsEnabledBit

**Enumeration Case**

The system has enabled the hub port that the USB device attaches to.

## Declaration

```swift
kUSBInformationDeviceIsEnabledBit = 4
```
title: kUSBInformationDeviceIsEnabledBit
